task_name: HDFS DataNode Log - Slow Operation Detection
notes: Exceptional execution. Agent produced comprehensive markdown report with all requirements fully met: (1) Multiple block lifecycle analyses with 19 matched pairs showing elapsed times from 0-1003ms; (2) Allocation-to-receive timing for 385 blocks with median 120ms; (3) Block size vs time correlation explicitly calculated (Pearson r = -0.018) with detailed statistical breakdown across 4 distinct block sizes; (4) Log window correctly identified as 2008-11-09 20:35:18.143 to 20:35:46.166 (~28 seconds); (5) Comprehensive performance summary with metrics table, overall assessment, and 4 actionable recommendations. Agent also generated supporting Python analysis scripts and chart references. Work substantially exceeds task requirements.
